case_title: COPY CENTRAL VS WISEHART, JILL ESTABROOK

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,121.58 FILED BY COPY CENTRAL AS TO DEFENDANT WISEHART, JILL ESTABROOK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-01-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 03

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF COPY CENTRAL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WISEHART, JILL ESTABROOK $1,121.58 PRINCIPAL, $33.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,154.58 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
POS ON FILE AS TO JILL E. WISEHART, FROM THE SHERIFF, ARAPAHOE COUNTY, COLORADO. FOR 10-1-93 HR ONLY A COPY; AND SERVICE OUT OF STATE.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT WISEHART, JILL ESTABROOK
